candidate_registry.name: governed-incident-command
candidate_registry.label: Baseline
candidate_registry.description: Build governed incident command packets from alerts, incident notes, transcripts, and stakeholder requirements. Use when asked to standardize incident review, severity assessment, incident communication, or incident packet assembly into one reusable operational skill. Do not use for generic debugging, one-off incident explanations, or brainstorming possible response ideas.
